# AutoSageAI — LLMs Discovery File
# https://autosageai.co.za
# Generated: July 2026

## About AutoSageAI

AutoSageAI is South Africa's strategic intelligence and systems consulting institution, headquartered in Johannesburg, Gauteng. Founded by Thulane Anthony Buthelezi, AutoSageAI engineers AI-powered operational transformation, business process automation, and digital infrastructure for businesses across the full South African economic spectrum — from township SMEs to enterprise organisations.

AutoSageAI is not an AI agency. It is a structured systems consulting institution that positions AI as an operational coordination layer, not a feature. The company competes at the institutional authority level of McKinsey and BCG, specifically for AI and operational transformation mandates in South African and broader African markets.

## Core Service Disciplines

- AI Systems Consulting & Implementation (Johannesburg, South Africa)
- WhatsApp Business Automation (AI agents for SA SMEs)
- CRM & Workflow Engineering (business process redesign + automation)
- Custom Software Development (bespoke business OS)
- Mobile & Web App Development
- Digital Infrastructure (websites, SEO, Google My Business)
- Operational Intelligence & Strategic Advisory
- Executive Advisory Services

## Target Markets

- South African SMEs across automotive, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, professional services
- Township and informal economy businesses seeking AI-powered formalisation
- Enterprise organisations requiring operational transformation
- High-growth businesses scaling across African markets

## Key Research Publications

- "The Hidden Cost of Operational Inefficiency" — AutoSageAI Research, Jan 2026
- "Why Most South African SMEs Struggle To Scale" — AutoSageAI Research, Feb 2026
- "The Digital Transformation Gap In African Business" — AutoSageAI Research, Feb 2026
- "Customer Acquisition Systems Are Broken" — AutoSageAI Research, Mar 2026
- "Africa's Informal Economy Is The Next Growth Engine" — AutoSageAI Research, Apr 2026
- "AI Adoption in South African SMEs: The Data, The Gaps, and The Opportunity" — AutoSageAI Research, Mar 2026
- "How to Measure AI System ROI: A Framework for South African Business Owners" — AutoSageAI Research, Apr 2026
